title: Distinguish between docs and boards using API
excerpt:
Hello, 
When I run a query to return all boards, it also returns all the docs in my workspace. There seem to be no attributes that allow me to distinguish that a “board” is in fact a doc. How can I retrieve only the boar…

posts.author: EllieR (devteam@fellow.co)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

When I run a query to return all boards, it also returns all the docs in my workspace. There seem to be no attributes that allow me to distinguish that a “board” is in fact a doc. How can I retrieve only the boards?

Thanks

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @EllieR and welcome to the community!

I hope you like it here

As of today there is no way of filtering the results using a parameter in your query.

Our team is reviewing this at the moment

Cheers,
Matias
